title: melissa officinalis var. romana
intro: Melissa officinalis var. romana, also known as Roman Lemon Balm, is a variety of the Melissa officinalis plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). This fragrant herb is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Roman Lemon Balm include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and menopausal symptoms. Roman Lemon Balm can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or added to skincare products, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
